question: What is Jinja templating in dbt and what are the three Jinja block types?
answer: Jinja is the templating engine dbt uses to make SQL dynamic. Three block types: {{ expression }} renders a value (e.g., {{ ref('orders') }}, {{ var('start_date') }}). {% statement %} executes logic without rendering (e.g., {% if is_incremental() %}...{% endif %}, {% for col in columns %}). {# comment #} is a comment ignored at compile time. dbt compiles Jinja into pure SQL before sending it to the warehouse, so the warehouse only sees standard SQL.
